posts.author: Abdullah
posts.community: Oriana Power - SME play on Renewable Energy
posts.text: There is some confusion regarding the sale of a subsidiary by Oriana. so just sharing a point of view, Selling subsidiaries, where they sell a solar power generating asset with long standing PPAs is not a distressed sale. And revenue coming from this activity is not non-core or non-operating income. Rather this is the business model itself. In June 2025, management stated their explicit intent to sell power assets to institutional funds and InvITs to continuously recycle cash into new projects . In November 2025, they confirmed that asset recycling would be a regular, year-on-year business pra…

posts.text: What’s the point of a conference call when management simply reads scripted answers and selectively responds only to the questions they choose? This raises serious questions about the transparency of the management and its willingness to engage openly with investors.
